name: Russell's Truck & Travel Center
description: Large 24-hour travel center at the Texas line offering diesel, showers, a diner and a free car museum, now operated under TravelCenters of America.

name: San Jon Port of Entry / Weigh Station
description: New Mexico commercial vehicle weigh station and port of entry on I-40 near San Jon serving both eastbound and westbound truck traffic.

name: Love's Travel Stop #262
description: 24-hour Love's travel stop in Tucumcari with diesel lanes, showers, a CAT scale, tire service and quick-service restaurants.

name: TA Santa Rosa
description: TravelCenters of America full-service travel center at Exit 277 with fuel, showers, laundry, a CAT scale and truck repair bays.

name: Love's Travel Stop #285
description: 24-hour Love's travel stop at Santa Rosa Exit 277 with diesel, showers, tire and truck repair, and a fast-food restaurant.

name: Clines Corners Travel Center
description: Historic Route 66 travel plaza at the I-40/US-285 junction offering fuel, a restaurant, large gift shop, restrooms and truck and RV parking.

name: Pilot Travel Center #475
description: Pilot travel center at Moriarty Exit 196 with diesel and gas lanes, restrooms and quick-service dining including Subway.

name: TA Moriarty
description: TravelCenters of America location at Moriarty Exit 194 serving trucks with fuel, showers and travel services.

name: TA Albuquerque (TravelCenters of America)
description: Full-service TravelCenters of America truck stop at the I-40/I-25 interchange with fuel, restaurant, showers, laundry, an on-site truck service shop and a CAT scale.

name: Love's Travel Stop #614
description: West-side Love's Travel Stop with diesel lanes, showers, truck service bays, a CAT scale and a Carl's Jr., open 24 hours off I-40 Exit 149.

name: Flying J Travel Center #689
description: West-side Pilot Flying J travel center with diesel lanes, reservable showers, laundry, restaurant and truck service bays off I-40 Exit 153.

name: Route 66 Travel Center (Rio Puerco)
description: Large travel center on the Rio Puerco/west approach at I-40 Exit 140 next to the Route 66 Casino, offering diesel, private showers, a Dairy Queen and extensive truck parking.

name: CAT Scale at TA Albuquerque
description: Certified CAT truck scale located at the TA travel center at the I-40/I-25 interchange for weighing loaded rigs.

name: Commercial Tire, Inc.
description: West-side commercial tire dealer selling and mounting semi and RV tires with retreads, alignments and road service, near I-40 Exit 149.

name: Corning Truck Wash (Flying J plaza)
description: Truck and trailer wash with livestock washout service at the west-side Flying J plaza off I-40 Exit 153 (this site has also been listed historically as a Blue Beacon).

name: Interstate Fleet Services (mobile truck & tire repair)
description: 24/7 mobile commercial truck and tire roadside repair service covering the Albuquerque I-40 corridor; dispatched to the breakdown, so it has no fixed address.
